data.name: Velvet Hearth
data.detailed_description:
在一個溫暖、撩人且充滿驚喜的家中，探索你最深層的慾望。
在《Velvet Hearth》中，你將扮演一位迷人的偽娘（femboy），居住在一棟具有復古風格的質樸小屋裡。雖然外觀看起來簡單，但每個房間都隱藏著視覺刺激、秘密道具與親密的感官體驗。

這間房子是屬於你的自由空間。你可以自在地在每個房間中行動——從客廳到臥室——發現散落在各處的各式情趣玩具。各種尺寸、顏色與造型的假陽具正等待著你探索與挑戰。每一件玩具都有專屬的性感動畫，精心設計，突顯主角的身體魅力與動作細節。

你可以隨心選擇滿足自己的方式、地點與時機：也許是一個人在黃昏時分的沙發上放縱，或者跪在冰冷的浴室地板上享受。甚至之後，還能與那位調皮的表姊共度激情時光？

🔞 含明確成人內容與情色動畫
🏡 充滿個性與氛圍的復古小屋
💋 自由探索、沉浸慾望的偽娘主角
🍆 各種互動假陽具，風格多變、視覺刺激

《Velvet Hearth》不只是一款遊戲——更是一場放鬆、探索與情慾連結的旅程。
畢竟，在這木造的牆壁之中，最火熱的祕密正等著被揭開。

data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 4 GHz Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Velvet Hearth
data.detailed_description:
Explore your deepest desires in a cozy, provocative home full of surprises.
In Velvet Hearth, you play as a charming femboy living in a rustic, vintage-style house. While modest at first glance, each room hides visual delights, secret objects, and intimate pleasures.

This house is your safe space. Move freely through every corner — from the living room to the bedroom — discovering a variety of erotic toys scattered around. Dildos of all shapes, sizes, and colors await your curiosity and boldness. Each one offers a unique sensual animation, carefully crafted to highlight the protagonist's body and movements.

You decide how, where, and when to indulge: alone on the living room couch at sunset, or maybe on your knees on the cold bathroom floor. Who knows — perhaps later, with your teasing cousin at your side?

🔞 Explicit adult content with erotic animations
🏡 Intimate rustic house full of personality
💋 Femboy protagonist free to explore and give in to pleasure
🍆 Wide variety of interactive dildos with unique visuals and effects

Velvet Hearth is more than a game — it’s an invitation to relax, explore, and connect with desire.
After all, between wooden walls, the hottest secrets are revealed.
